description: A Canadian dish of hot fries topped with cheese curds and gravy. It is especially associated with Quebec and is often served as a rich comfort food.
preparation_steps: Prepare or fry the potatoes until crisp.
Place hot fries on a serving plate or container.
Pour hot gravy over the top and serve immediately.

health_advice.benefits: Very filling and often shared, which can help portion control if eaten occasionally.
health_advice.risks: Typically high in calories, sodium, and saturated fat.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Treat it as an occasional indulgence and keep portion sizes modest.

dietary_notes.note: Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free versions depend on the gravy, fries, and cheese alternatives used.

best_served_with: Simple salad if served as a meal
